Story quest chain

Bug Legs

23 parts
StarterAF Recycle Station
Systems3
Targets10
Rewards13

Chain Overview

StartAF Recycle Station
SystemFulzar
Parts23
First questBug Legs: Part 1

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Route & Targets

  • System: Fulzar
  • System: Hozar
  • System: Zergilin
  • Location: Abandoned Hangar in Fulzar
  • Location: Warp Gate in Hozar
  • Location: Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin
  • Targets: Bionic Macrophage lvl 71, Renegade Spy-1, Bionic Daemon lvl 73, Aureus Warrior lvl 75, Aureus Monachus lvl 73
  • Items: Bug Leg, Genetic Control Implant, Brain Tissue, Hydrogen Oscillator, Radiated Junk

Part 1: Bug Legs: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5600-5800 + 3 Flux

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at AF Recycle Station in Fulzar.
  2. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 2.

Description

Lieutenant Nguyen: ”Captain, we received a message for you, unfortunately due to static interference we were just able to decode two words: ‘Bug’ and ‘Legs’. I wonder what that could possibly mean… well I don’t have time for this so I’ll leave it up to you to figure out.”

“Find Xhargreg somewhere in Fulzar.”

Completion

Xhargreg: ”What took you so long? There’s an emergency of untold proportions unfolding here. The world is in dire need of saving! And you were busy doing… uhm… exactly… what? You must hurry! Head over to the Hozar system already, I will contact you again once you get to the Warp Gate.”

Part 2: Bug Legs: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4600

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 3.

Description

Go to the warp gate in Hozar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Finally! This situation is far worse than I anticipated. The horrible truth is... that... uhm… that I’m completely out of bug legs! This is where you come in, get me… hmmm about… 512 bug legs, yes… ehrm… about 512 bug legs should be enough for now.

Part 3: Bug Legs: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Collect 512 Bug Leg

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 512 Bug Leg.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 4.

Description

Gather 512 bug legs from any of the larger moths.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Great work there… ehrm.. this must be your greatest achievement ever! Head back over here at once with the bug legs.”

Part 4: Bug Legs: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 8400-8600

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 5.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Now that the dreadful ‘bug leg crisis’ finally has been resolved... we can go back to the less important issues… have you by any chance noticed the situation in Fulzar? The most distressing part... is... that there doesn’t seem to be any new bugs here... *sob*... I mean… what’s the use of exploring a new system if there are no bugs around? *sob* We should focus on resolving this issue...”

Part 5: Bug Legs: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP26k F16

Defeat 64 Bionic Macrophage lvl 71

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 64 Bionic Macrophage lvl 71.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 6.

Description

Xhargreg: ”Remember the mutagenic poison you discovered from the Experimental Macrophages back in Sarkinon? It seems like the Nezerians have perfected this toxin, so why don’t you go and make yourself useful... collect about…. a bit of it? I would recommend filling that ship of yours to the brim with the mutagenic poison… by doing it that way you can get enough in just one trip! Think about the time you’ll save!!! Hehehehhrgrhghghgh!”*Gather Poison from 64 Bionic Macrophages*

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Hurry back here!! I can’t wait to make more giant wasps!!”

Crew: “Are you sure Captain?”

Crew: “I hate wasps!!”

Crew: “Uhg... this stuff can’t be healthy, let’s just dump it somewhere… ”

Part 6: Bug Legs: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 8400-8600

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 7.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”It works!! HAHAhahahehheh... *coughing*… I think it likes you!”

Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz!”

Crew “Eeeek!”

Xhargreg: ”Excellent! But we are not done yet! Lets think bigger! ”

Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzz??”

Part 7: Bug Legs: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Collect 8 Genetic Control Implant

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 8 Genetic Control Implant.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 8.

Description

Xhargreg: ”It’s large.. yes… but not like a Moth Alpha or… those Bionic Queens… I need to study the Genetic Control Implants used on the Bionic Queens, about 8 of those should be enough, they might be useful in regulating their growth cycle… just think about the potentials here!” *Xhargregs mind floats off into his own little world… probably filled with even more gigantic wasps….*

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Great! One Implant is actually enough… but I like the number 8 more… anyway return here with the implants… I need to try them right away! Hahahahehahgrh… oh and I even have a reward for you!”

Part 8: Bug Legs: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP6k Bug leg

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 9.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Gimme gimme gimme!!!”

*2h hours later*

Crew: “How about handing over that reward you mentioned?”

Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “BZZZZZ!”

Xhargreg: ”Sure…. just take a bug-leg... there is a pile somewhere...”

Part 9: Bug Legs: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4600

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 10.

Description

Xhargreg: ”I’ve run into a little problem… I don’t know if you have noticed… but those damn Nezerians are immune to poisons and highly resistant to kinetic attacks… this unfortunately results in an unfair advantage over my poor wasps… *sob*... you need to do something about this! The Renegades in Zergilin have developed a toxin that reduces kinetic resistances…hrmm... this could prove to be the key… go to my old lab in Zergilin”

Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “bzzzz???”

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Kill 32 Renegade Spies and collect samples from their Corrosive Missiles”

Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “bzzzz!!!”

Crew: “Eeeek! Where did that come from???”

Part 10: Bug Legs: Part 10

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Defeat 32 Renegade Spy-1

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 32 Renegade Spy-1.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 11.

Description

”Kill 32 Renegade Spies and collect samples from their Corrosive Missiles”

Completion

Crew: “we received a message from Xhargreg, it goes something like: ‘Bzzzz! Bzzzz! BZZZZ!!!’”

Crew: “Maybe we should return and check if Xhargreg is ok…”

Crew: “or run away to a guaranteed wasp free place…”

Part 11: Bug Legs: Part 11

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 8400-8600

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 12.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Welcome back… I hope you were successful? Now… erhm… let’s use the Genetic Control Chip to modify the Wasps toxin to mimic the renegade one you collected..”

*10 hours later*

Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “BzzZzzZzzzzZzz!!”

*It looks happy…*

Xhargreg: ”Success!!! Hahahahehahgrhegtrghh… You have been of great assistance to the wasps of this world! What more could you wish for in life???”

Crew: “Perhaps… a reward?”

Xhargreg: ”Next we have to deal with the Nezerians corrosive resistance… this is more tricky… the toxins of the Bionic Deamons could be useful… go gather some… or… a lot… like 8*8!”

Part 12: Bug Legs: Part 12

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP26k F16

Defeat 64 Bionic Daemon lvl 73

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 64 Bionic Daemon lvl 73.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 13.

Description

*Gather Poison from 64 Bionic Deamons*

Completion

Xhargreg: ”The Wasps have gather small pile of junk from their Nezerians victims… you can have it when if you return here… ”

Part 13: Bug Legs: Part 13

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP8.4k A8x92

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 14.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Hurry!!! Hand over the samples!! Excellent!!” *jumps up and down*

Crew: “And… the reward you mentioned? Let me guess a bug leg?”

Xhargreg: ”No… I can’t spare anything that valuable… take that pile of glowing cube like things that the wasps brought back… for some reason???”

Crew: “Errr… is that a pile of Artifacts??”

Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzz!!!!”

Crew: “Eeeek!”

Crew: “I supposes that’s a ‘yes’… errr… thanks?”

Part 14: Bug Legs: Part 14

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 16800

Collect 8 Brain Tissue

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 8 Brain Tissue.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 15.

Description

Xhargreg: ”I have an excellent idea.. I need you to bring me a few samples of brain tissue from that failure in Neurona…”

*Collect 8 Samples of Brain Tissue from the Mother Brain in Neurona*

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Hurry back! We are on the brink of a breakthrough here! Hahaharrhrgheheh…”

Part 15: Bug Legs: Part 15

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP12k A10x96

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 16.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Most facinating… I can’t wait to see the result of this experiment… Hehehehahahrgegeg… Whe wasps brought back another useless pile of glowing junk while you were gone… feel free to grab it.. I wonder why they do that anyway…”

Crew: “More artifacts! Finally something useful!”

Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: “Bzzzzzzz…?”

Xhargreg: ”I seem to have run out of Genetic Control Implants… I need you to fetch a few more…”

Part 16: Bug Legs: Part 16

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP32k F32

Collect 64 Genetic Control Implant

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 64 Genetic Control Implant.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 17.

Description

Gather 64 Genetic Control Implants from the Bionic Queens in Fulzar

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Excellent… this will allow me to create a whole new generation of wasps! I have prepared a truly unique reward for you this time…”

Crew: “I don’t like this… a truly unique reward can’t possibly be anything good when it comes from this guy…”

Part 17: Bug Legs: Part 17

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP12k Bionic Larva

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 18.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Here have a Bionic Larva… I duplicated the Nezerians Bionic technology and applied it to a more useful creature...”

Crew: “Errr… what? You want us to go inside that… thing?”

Xhargreg: ”Go try it out! Preferably on those Nezerians… they had stomach of calling me mad…. actually… when thinking about it…. I don’t know if they have a stomach… would you mind checking that for me? Hahahhahagagggrggr...”

Part 18: Bug Legs: Part 18

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP8k F8

Defeat 8 the quest targets in Fulzar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Fulzar.
  2. Defeat 8 the required hostiles.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 19.

Description

Go kill a few enemies…. with the Bionic Larva…

Crew: “Captain... why do we have to do this…?

Completion

Xhargreg: ”You think it’s too slow? Pff… actually I just had a great idea… almost a stroke of genius… have you noticed that those odd golden ships seems to have the ability to teleport? Yes… exactly TELEPORTING WASPS!!! This must be the greatest invention… since fire… or nuclear fusion...? Go investigate this Aureus Teleport Technology.. “

Crew: “Oh no… Captain, why did you have to give him that idea??”

Part 19: Bug Legs: Part 19

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP32k F32

Defeat 256 Aureus Warrior lvl 75, Aureus Monachus lvl 73

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 256 Aureus Warrior lvl 75, Aureus Monachus lvl 73.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 20.

Description

Go investigate the Aureus Teleport Technology.. kill a total of 256 Aureus Warriors and Aureus Monachus.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Good… I have managed to record the energy signature of their teleport devices...I will need some of those Hydrogen Oscillators”

Part 20: Bug Legs: Part 20

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Collect 32 Hydrogen Oscillator

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 32 Hydrogen Oscillator.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 21.

Description

Gather 32 Hydrogen Oscillators.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 21: Bug Legs: Part 21

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP12k A10x100

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 22.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar

Completion

Xhargreg: ”I’m sure that I can reverse engineer how their teleport devices works from this… yes…”

Crew: “Really?? That’s actually truly impressive.. for once.. “

Xhargreg: ”The Wasps keeps bring back piles of those glowing things… please just take some of them… before I’m out of space for my highly important scientific research...“

Crew: “More artifacts! I don’t know if this is even more impressive… Thanks?”

Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: “Bzz! Thank! bzzz... You! Bzz..”

Crew: “Errr… what’s happening here?”

Part 22: Bug Legs: Part 22

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP16k F8

Collect 1024 Radiated Junk

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 1024 Radiated Junk.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bug Legs: Part 23.

Description

Xhargreg: ”I need some fuel for the teleportation device… I’m going to have to extract it from Radiated Junk… gather 1024 pieces of it..“

Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: “Bzz!”

Crew: “Bzz to you too!

Truly Gigantic Mutated Wasp: *Happy Bzz!*

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 23: Bug Legs: Part 23

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP12k A10x100

Travel / deliver to Abandoned Hangar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Abandoned Hangar.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Return to Xhargreg in Fulzar.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”...”

*8 hours later*

Xhargreg: ”It’s done!!! I’ve succeeded! A teleporting Wasp! The world has change for the better today! Hehehehhrgrhgrhghrgh”

Crew: “Oh no…”

Xhargreg: ”I also fitted your Bionic Larva with a Teleportation Device… and there’s another pile of those glowing things… apparently the Wasps are attracted to those… I can’t possibly imagine why... just throw it away or something...”

Crew: “Thanks?”

Truly Gigantic Mutated Teleporting Wasp: *Happy Bzz!*

Crew: “I’m not sure if what we have done today really is a good thing…”

Truly Gigantic Mutated Teleporting Wasp: *Sad bzz...*

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
